verify.subject: Tabbatar da Imel
verify.title: Tabbatar da Asusunku
verify.desc: Mun gode da shiga tsarinmu. Da fatan za a danna maɓallin da ke ƙasa don gaskata adireshin imel ɗin ku kuma fara sarrafa otal ɗin ku:
verify.note: Lura: Wannan mahaɗin yana aiki ne na tsawon sa'o'i 24.
verify.ignore: Idan ba kai ne ka ƙirƙiri wannan asusun ba, da fatan za a yi watsi da wannan imel ɗin.
verify.copyright: Tsarin Gudanar da Sabandun Otal. Dukkan haƙƙoƙi mallakar mu ne.

reset.subject: Sake Saita Kalmar Sirri
reset.title: Bukatar Sake Saita Kalmar Sirri
reset.desc: Mun sami buƙatun sake saita kalmar sirrin ku. Kuna iya yin hakan ta danna maɓallin da ke ƙasa:
reset.note: Wannan mahaɗin yana aiki ne na tsawon sa'a 1.
reset.ignore: Idan ba ku nemi wannan ba, da fatan za a yi watsi da wannan imel; kalmar sirrinku ba za ta canza ba.
reset.copyright: Tsarin Gudanar da Sabandun Otal. Dukkan haƙƙoƙi mallakar mu ne.

rooms.title: Dakuna
rooms.bulkDownloadInfo: Kuna gab da fitarwa da lambobin QR na ɗakuna {count}.
rooms.sizeHelpText: Canzawa girman QR da aka fitarwa a santimita don dacewa da kwafin bugunku, tsayawar acrylic, ko alamomin ƙofa.
rooms.printWarning: Muhimmi: Domin samun girman daidai, tabbatar an zabi tsarin 'Fit to paper' a wajen bugun takarda a Chrome. Idan bai yi daidai ba, yi kokarin amfani da Microsoft Edge.

notifications.reminderTitle: Tunatarwa: Ododi da basu kammala ba
notifications.reminderBody: Kuna da {count} sabbin ododi da ke jira!

ordersDetails.cancelReasonRequired: Da fatan za a zaɓi dalilin sokewa
presets: Abun da aka nema babu shi
Bako ya riga ya fita daga otal (Checked-out)

philosophy.title: Manufar Tsarin
philosophy.content: An tsara QR SYS don haɗa baƙi da ma'aikatan otal ta hanyar dijital. Baƙi na iya yin odar sabis kai tsaye daga ɗakinsu ba tare da sun kira wurin taron ba.

registration.title: Rajista & Kunna
registration.content: Danna 'Register New Hotel' a babban shafin. Cika mahimman bayanai kamar sunan otal, yankin lokaci da kudin waje. Tabbatar da imel ya zama dole don kunna asusun.

login.title: Shiga
login.content: Shiga ta amfani da imel da kalmar sirrin ku. Idan kai ma'aikaci ne, samu bayanan shiga daga mai kula da kai.

forgotPassword.title: Kun manta Kalmar Sirri?
forgotPassword.content: Yi amfani da mahaɗin 'Manta Kalmar Sirri?' don karɓar mahaɗin sake saita a cikin imel ɗin ku.

orders.title: Gudanar da Oda
orders.content: Kula da duk ododi a wuri ɗaya. Ododi suna da matakai: 'Sabo', 'Ana kan yi', da 'Kammalawa'.

services.title: Sabis & Ƙananan Sabis
services.content: An kasafta ayyuka zuwa manyan rukuni da ƙananan ayyuka. Kuna iya saita lokacin aiki da bayanai ga kowane ɗayan.

items.title: Gudanar da Abubuwa
items.content: Sarrafa takamaiman abubuwa kamar menu na abinci, tare da farashi da kasancewarsu.

rooms.title: Dakuna & QR Codes
rooms.content: Kowane daki yana da lambar QR ta musamman. Kuna iya saukewa kuma buɗa su don ɗakunan.

employees.title: Ma'aikata & Matsayi
employees.content: Sarrafa ƙungiyar ku ta hanyar sanya matsayi kamar Mai Kula da Otal ko Ma'aikacin Sabis.

reports.title: Rahotanni & Ƙididdiga
reports.content: Duba ayyukan otal ɗin ku ta hanyar zane-zane na kuɗi da yawan oda.

settings.title: Saituna & Harsuna
settings.content: Canja fasalin otal ɗin ku ta hanyar ɗora logo, canza harsuna ko saita yankin lokaci.
